heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 4918 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter (other than for research and development) $15,000,000 for the fiscal year ending .September 30, 1979
notes: Amendments1978— substituted provisions authorizing appropriations of $15,000,000 for 1979 for provisions authorizing appropriations for fiscal years 1973 to 1977 and struck out restriction on expenditures for research and development.Pub. L. 95–6091976— inserted authorization of appropriations for fiscal year ending , the transition period, and fiscal year ending , and provisions excepting appropriations for research and development use.Pub. L. 94–301June 30, 1976September 30, 1977
